occupation: Director Business Development, Programmatic Media at Broadsign
summary: At Broadsign, my mission is to revolutionize the connection between media agencies, advertisers, and audiences through programmatic digital out-of-home (DOOH) advertising solutions. Leveraging my expertise in programmatic technology, I am committed to driving business optimization and enabling seamless programmatic transactions.

experiences.title: Director Business Development, Programmatic Media
experiences.description: Providing Media Agencies and Advertisers with the best solutions to connect with their audiences across the globe while leveraging all the advantages of programmatic DOOH. Broadsign is the industry-leading Digital Out of Home (DOOH) software provider that helps media owners and advertisers unlock the full power of DOOH through automation, business optimization, and support for programmatic transactions.

experiences.title: Head of Strategic Partnerships and Sponsoring
experiences.description: Gategroup is the global leader in airline catering, retail-on-board and hospitality products and services. We provide passengers with superior culinary and retail experiences, leveraging innovation and advanced technology solutions. Headquartered in Zurich, Switzerland, gategroup deliver operational excellence through the most extensive catering network in the aviation industry, serving more than 700 million passengers annually from over 200 operating units in over 60 countries/territories across all continents. In 2018, gategroup reached CHF 4.9 billion in revenues generated by approximately 43,000 employees worldwide.

experiences.title: Director Schiphol Media
experiences.description: Schiphol Amsterdam Airport offers a wide range of high traffic advertising possibilities for your media campaigns. Find out how we can help you to create an effective and targeted advertising campaign in our dynamic environment in which we reach over 70mln passengers per year. Check out our page: https://www.schiphol.nl/en/advertising/ Or contact Schiphol Media for a tailor made proposal: http://www.schiphol.nl/media

experiences.title: VP of Marketing and Engagement
experiences.description: Responsible for growing, retaining and activating ELEQT’s global member base. The job included both building teams in different regions and head these teams in our efforts to drive: Product Marketing, Marketing partnerships, PR, Content, Events and Platform Development. ELEQT is an exclusive international luxury lifestyle social network that was founded as a result of a merger between Elysiants Inc. and the Quintessentially group in 2012, which is the world's leading luxury lifestyle management and concierge service. Membership with ELEQT can only be obtained by invitation thus creating a global network of like-minded, high net worth individuals and offering them the opportunity to access the best possible luxury lifestyle benefits. ELEQT offers our members access to exclusive events, luxury lifestyle experiences and a wide range of benefits associated with our multitude of brand partners that include the finest brands and hotspots. ELEQT is headquartered in London and has active chapters in Hong Kong, Singapore, Dubai, São Paulo, Santiago de Chile, Amsterdam, New York, Los Angeles, Chicago Boston, Aruba and Curacao.

experiences.title: VP of Business Development
experiences.description: Responsible for Global Strategic Partnerships, Market Development and the day-to-day operations of our EMEA & ASPAC regions including managing the P&L of our London, Amsterdam, Dubai, Hong Kong and Singapore offices.

experiences.title: Business Development Director
experiences.description: Responsible for advertising sales, setting up international partnerships and launching the Elysiants network in new regions.

experiences.title: VP Sales
experiences.description: Responsible for setting up and managing the online advertising operations of all online properties owned by GET N.V. and in particular www.efreshportal.com.

experiences.title: Sales Director
experiences.description: Responsible for international Online Media sales at eBuddy.com

experiences.title: Sales Manager
experiences.description: -Responsible for build-out of sales revenues from scratch for start-up -Responsible for growing revenues and achieving sales quotas.

experiences.title: Treasury analyst
experiences.description: Research conducted in the field of US Cash Management with special interest for electronic payments and cash forecasting
